action.name: Bestial Strike (Land Only)
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one target. {@dice 1d12} + your Wisdom modifier bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. This damage is increased to {@dice 2d8} + double your Wisdom modifier from 5th level onwards, which counts as the attack being affected by the Empowered Attack feature.

action.name: Bestial Strike (Sea Only)
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one target. {@dice 1d6} + your Wisdom modifier bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. This damage is increased to {@dice 2d6} + double your Wisdom modifier from 5th level onwards, which counts as the attack being affected by the Empowered Attack feature.

action.name: Bestial Strike (Sky Only)
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one target. {@dice 1d4} + your Wisdom modifier bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. This damage is increased to {@dice 2d4} + double your Wisdom modifier from 5th level onwards, which counts as the attack being affected by the Empowered Attack feature.

hp.special: you continue to use your hit points and Hit Dice

trait.name: Amphibious (Sea Only)
entries: You can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Flyby (Sky Only)
entries: You don't provoke opportunity attacks when you fly out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Keen Senses (Land and Sky Only)
entries: You have advantage on {@skill Perception} checks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one target. {@dice 6d6} + triple your Wisdom modifier bludgeoning damage (or fire damage for a Fire elemental). This attack counts as having two instances of the Empowered Attack feature affecting it.

hp.special: you continue to use your hit points and Hit Dice

trait.name: Amorphous Form (Air, Fire, and Water Only)
entries: You can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Elemental Burst
entries: Elemental power erupts from you when you reach 0 hit points. You make a reflex attack against each adjacent creature that deals bludgeoning damage (or fire damage for a Fire elemental) equal to your level plus your Wisdom modifier.

trait.name: Insubstantial (Air and Fire Only)
entries: You cannot be {@condition grappled}, knocked {@condition prone}, or {@condition restrained}.

monster.name: Spell Automaton

bonus.name: Overclock (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The automaton takes the Dash action.

languages: understands any known by its creator but cannot speak

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one target. {@damage 4d10 + 8} + double your Intelligence modifier bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Integrated Spell
entries: The automaton uses the spell invention integrated into it to cast a spell, governed by your Intelligence instead of its own. If the spell invention integrated into it would burn out due to the result of the fizzle die, the automaton takes 33 true damage instead.

monster.name: Eldritch Cannon

action.name: Cannon (Flamethrower Only)
entries: The cannon exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. It makes an area spell reflex attack against each creature in that area, dealing {@dice 4d4} fire damage. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

action.name: Cannon (Force Ballista Only)
entries: {@atk rs} range 120 ft., one target. {@damage 2d8} force damage. On a hit, the target is pushed 5 feet away from the cannon.

action.name: Cannon (Protector Only)
entries: The cannon emits a burst of positive energy that grants itself and each creature of your choice within 10 feet of it a number of temporary hit points equal to {@dice 1d10} + your Intelligence modifier (minimum of +1).

majorEffect: The cannon recovers hit points equal to your level. If it is already on full hit points, it instead gains that amount of temporary hit points.

trait.name: Sustainable Engineering
entries: Whenever the {@spell mending|sns} spell is cast on the cannon, the cannon regains {@dice 2d6} hit points.

monster.name: Eldritch Megacannon

action.name: Cannon (Flamethrower Only)
entries: The cannon exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. It makes an area spell reflex attack against each creature in that area, dealing {@dice 3d12} fire damage. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

action.name: Cannon (Force Ballista Only)
entries: {@atk rs} range 120 ft., one target. {@damage 4d8} force damage. On a hit, the target is pushed 10 feet away from the cannon.

action.name: Cannon (Protector Only)
entries: The cannon emits a burst of positive energy that grants itself and each creature of your choice within 10 feet of it a number of temporary hit points equal to {@dice 2d10} + double your Intelligence modifier (minimum of +2).

majorEffect: The cannon recovers hit points equal to your level. If it is already on full hit points, it instead gains that amount of temporary hit points.

trait.name: Sustainable Engineering
entries: Whenever the {@spell mending|sns} spell is cast on the cannon, the cannon regains {@dice 2d6} hit points.

monster.name: Zombie

action.name: Grab
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one target. {@damage 1d6 + 1} bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is {@condition grappled}. Until the grapple ends, the zombie can't grab another target.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one {@condition grappled} target. {@damage 1d10 + 1} piercing damage, and the zombie regains the same number of hit points.

majorEffect: The zombie may immediately shift 5 feet.

trait.name: Undead Fortitude (1/Day)
entries: If the zombie is reduced to 0 hit points by damage that isn't radiant or from a critical hit, it's instead reduced to 1 hit point, falls {@condition prone}, and is {@condition incapacitated} until the end of its next turn, appearing to be dead.

trait.name: Undead Nature
entries: A zombie doesn't require air, sustenance, or sleep.

monster.name: Summoned Minion

action.name: Melee attack
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one target. 5 + triple your level bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage.

majorEffect: The target's armour is reduced by 1 for 1 round.
